description: Create a content slide on changes to manage private credit exposures with a left text summary, a two-column horizontal bar chart of response percentages, and a bottom-right KPI callout.

header.headline: Figure 8: Changes to manage private credit exposures

sidebar.body: To manage the risks associated with private credit, CROs are looking to adjust their exposure limits to nonbank financial institutions, more closely examine counterparty and concentration risk, and enhance scenario planning. G-SIB CROs are much more likely to be pursuing these enhancements, befitting their much greater exposures.

series.label: Adjusting risk appetite or exposure limits to nonbank financial institutions
Strengthening stress testing and scenario analysis
Enhancing counterparty and fund-level due diligence
Addressing data quality or availability challenges related to private market exposure
Monitoring developments but no major changes implemented
